markdownRemark.html:
Awesome JSON

A curated list of awesome JSON libraries and resources.

Inspired by the awesomestars164.8k list.

  • Awesome JSON
    • Applications
    • Binary Serialization
    • Browser Extensions
    • Command-line tools
    • Databases
    • Datasets
    • Data modeling
    • Data generation
    • Differencing
    • Editors
    • Format Extensions
    • Frontend components
    • Libraries
    • Linters

Applications

OS X

  • Visual JSON (githubstars289) - simple JSON pretty-viewer for Mac OS X.
  • JSONExportstars4.5k - convert a object to a class of one of the currently supported languages.

Binary Serialization

  • BSON - Binary JSON.
  • MessagePack - An extremely efficient object serialization library.
  • UBJSON - The universally compatible format specification for binary JSON.
  • CBOR - Concise Binary Object Representation.
  • PSONstars433 - Protocol JSON, super efficient binary serialization format.

Browser Extensions

Chrome

  • JSON Formatter (githubstars2.6k) - Makes JSON easy to read. Open source.
  • JSON Viewer (githubstars2.4k) - It is a Chrome extension for printing JSON and JSONP.
  • JSON Browser (githubstars11) - Browse a JSON web with the help of JSON schemas.
  • JSON Finder (githubstars36) - Browse like you do it in Finder.
  • JSON Viewer Pro (githubstars384 - An open source Chrome extension for browsing JSON with syntax highlighting and folding, or as a visual graph.
  • Discoverable JSON (githubstars2) - Gron inspired Extension. Convert a JSON document into javascript expressions. Comes with filter, remove, find-and-replace capabilities.

Firefox

  • JSONView (githubstars1k) - View JSON documents in the browser.

Safari

  • JSONAce (githubstars72) - Formats & syntax highlights JSON viewed inside of the web browser using the ACE editor.
  • JSONView (githubstars292) - A port of the JSONView Firefox extension that formats and syntax highlights JSON viewed inside of the browser

Command-line tools

  • fxstars10.7k - A interactive terminal tool.
  • jostars3.1k - A small utility to create JSON objects
  • jsoncatstars25 - Pretty-print Json in terminal with colors and adjusting tabs size.
  • jq - A lightweight and flexible command-line JSON processor.
  • json - A "json" command for massaging JSON on your Unix command line.
  • jshon - A parser designed for maximum convenience within the shell.
  • jarg - Shorthand JSON and form encoding syntax in the shell.
  • jsawkstars1.3k - Like awk, but for JSON.
  • json-dotenvstars3 - Manipulate and extract envfiles in json format.
  • gronstars9k - Convert a JSON file into discrete assignments that are greppable.
  • jidstars5.9k - Incremental Digger. Drill down JSON interactively by using filtering queries like jq.
  • jiqstars584 - It's jid with jq. You can drill down interactively by using jq filtering queries.
  • jvstars106 - jv (for jsonviewer) helps you view your JSON.
  • jlstars453 - Functional sed for JSON.
  • ojstars374 - A fast and flexible command line JSON processor.
  • visidatastars3.8k - A terminal spreadsheet-like tool for interactively exploring data.

Databases

  • MongoDB - an open-source document database, and the leading NoSQL database.
  • RethinkDB - An open-source distributed document database with a pleasant and powerful query language.
  • EJDBstars1.2k - Embedded JSON Database engine published under MIT license. (C)
  • lowdbstars15.3k - Flat file database built on lodash API. (Javascript)
  • Lawnchairstars2.1k - A lightweight clientside document store. (Javascript)
  • JSON ODMstars87 - Object document mapper for JavaScript to use on the server or in the browser. (Javascript)
  • JSON Serverstars54k - Get a full fake REST API with zero coding in less than 30 seconds.
  • Kintostars4.1k - A lightweight JSON storage service with synchronisation and sharing abilities.
  • CouchDB - Seamless multi-master sync, that scales from Big Data to Mobile, with an Intuitive HTTP/JSON API and designed for Reliability.
  • RxDBstars15.6k - Event-driven JSON-Database with JSON-Schema, mango-Query and CouchDB-sync. (Javascript)
  • JSONlitestars823 - A simple, self-contained, serverless, zero-configuration, json document store. (Bash)

Datasets

  • country.io - Various country related datasets, as JSON inc currency, country codes, names and more
  • countriesstars5.2k - World countries.
  • vat-rates - VAT rates for all EU countries.
  • MTG JSON - Up to date Magic the Gathering card data.
  • Heartstone JSON - Up to date Hearthstone card data.
  • getCountries() - Generator for custom Countries data.

Data modeling

  • JSONModelstars6.8k - Magical Data Modelling Framework. (Objective-C)

Data generation

  • jsonymizestars14 - Reads data from standard input, anonymizes, then writes to standard output.
  • dysonstars817 - Server for dynamic, fake JSON. (node.js)

Differencing

  • JSONPatch - A format for describing changes to a document.
  • JSON-Patchstars1.4k - Lean and mean Javascript implementation of the JSON-Patch standard (RFC 6902). (Javascript)
  • jiffstars481 - JSON Patch and diff based on rfc6902. (Javascript)
  • json-patch-phpstars103 - implementation of JSON-patch (IETF RFC 6902) (PHP)
  • dffptchstars165 - A micro library for diffing and patching using a compact diff format. (Javascript)
  • jsondiffpatchstars3.7k - Diff & patch for JavaScript objects. (Javascript)

Editors

  • FrontAid CMS - Content Management System that supports arbitrary data model structures.
  • JSONEdit - User friendly, visual editor built as an AngularJS directive.

Format Extensions

  • GeoJSON - A geospatial data interchange format.
  • JSON-LD - A lightweight Linked Data format.
  • JSON-RPC - A stateless, light-weight remote procedure call (RPC) protocol.
  • JSONP - Safer cross-domain Ajax with JSON-P/JSONP.
  • JsonML - A compact format for transporting XML-based markup as JSON which allows it to be losslessly converted back to its original form.
  • JSON5 - a extension that aims to make it easier for humans to write and maintain by hand.
  • JSON6stars190 - JSON for Humans (ES6).
  • JSON 1.1/JSONX - An evolved version 1.1 with format extension for humans incl. comments, unquoted and multi-line strings, optional and trailing commas and more.
  • JSON Resume - The open source initiative to create standard for resumes.
  • JSON Web Tokens - A compact URL-safe means of representing claims to be transferred between two parties.
  • JSON API - A standard for building APIs.
  • Collection+JSON - A read/write hypermedia-type designed to support management and querying of simple collections.
  • hal-json - A set of conventions for expressing hyperlinks in either JSON or XML.
  • JSON Activity Streams - A format for syndicating social activities around the web.
  • JSON-statstars21 - Simple lightweight format for data dissemination.
  • /contribute.json - Making open source contribution information easier to access, across projects.
  • JSON Table Schema - a simple schema for tabular data
  • NDJSON (Newline delimited JSON) - a standard for delimiting JSON in stream protocols.
  • survey.js - JSON based survey library.
  • JSON Meta Application Protocol (JMAP) - A protocol for synchronising JSON-based data objects efficiently, with support for push and out-of-band binary data upload/download.
  • JackSON: JSON secret keeperstars18 - JSONic way of storing secrets in config file.

Frontend components

  • JSON editor jQuery pluginstars554 - component for you web apps/pages. (jQuery)
  • jqTree - Widget for displaying a tree structure in html. (jQuery)
  • jsTree - jquery plugin, that provides interactive trees. (jQuery)
  • Dynatable.jsstars2.8k - A funner, semantic, HTML5+JSON, interactive table plugin. (jQuery)
  • JSON Formatterstars367 - Angular directive for collapsible JSON in HTML. (AngularJS)
  • react-jsonschema-form - A React component for building Web forms from JSON Schema. (React)
  • ngx-formlystars1.9k - JSON powered / Dynamic forms for Angular

Libraries

C

  • Jansson - A C library for encoding, decoding and manipulating data.
  • jsmn - A minimalistic parser in C. It can be easily integrated into the resource-limited projects or embedded systems.
  • ojcstars22 - A fast JSON parser.

C++

  • ArduinoJsonstars5.1k - An efficient library for embedded systems.
  • JSON++stars40 - A self contained Flex/Bison parser for C++11.
  • json11stars2.2k - A tiny library for C++11.
  • Nlohmann JSONstars24.4k - A C++11 header-only class.
  • RapidJSONstars10.8k - A fast JSON parser/generator for C++ with both SAX/DOM style API
  • simdjsonstars13.3k - Parsing gigabytes of JSON per second.

Clojure

  • data.jsonstars446 - parser/generator to/from Clojure data structures.

Fortran

  • JSON-Fortranstars222 - A Fortran library for writing, reading, and manipulating JSON files and data structures.

Go

  • ojgstars374 - A collection of high performance JSON processing and generating tool.

Haskell

  • aeson-qqstars70 - JSON quasiquoter for Haskell.
  • json-schema - JSON Schema library for Haskell
  • hjsonschema - JSON Schema Draft 4 library for Haskell

Java

  • JSON-javastars3.8k - A reference implementation.
  • Fast JSON Processorstars23.3k
  • Gsonstars19.5k - A Java library to convert JSON to Java objects and vice-versa.
  • Jacksonstars6.5k - A multi-purpose Java library for processing JSON data format.
  • moshistars7.3k - A modern JSON library for Android and Java.
  • essential-jsonstars1 - A lightweight Java library for serialization, parsing and manipulation with a clean and precise API.
  • dsl-jsonstars716 - A very fast streaming JSON library. Operates on byte arrays.
  • mjsonstars69 - Lean JSON Library for Java, with a compact, elegant API.

Javascript

  • JSON-jsstars8.3k - JSON in JavaScript.
  • JSON 3 - A modern implementation.
  • oboe.js - A streaming approach, speeds up web applications by providing parsed objects before the response completes.

Objective-C

  • JSONKitstars6.2k - Objective-C library.
  • SBJsonstars3.8k - Parse one or more chunks of data.

Perl

  • JSON::Tinystars11 - Perl module for encoding and decoding JSON in a minimalistic way.

PL/SQL

  • PL/JSONstars347 - A generic JSON object written in PL/SQL.

PHP

  • Webmozart JSONstars354 - A robust decoder/encoder with support for schema validation.

Python

  • simplejsonstars1.4k - A simple, fast, extensible encoder/decoder
  • jsonpickle - Library for serializing any arbitrary object graph.
  • metamagic.json - An ultra-fast Python 3 implementation of a JSON encoder.

Ruby

  • ojstars2.7k - A fast JSON parser and Object marshaller as a Ruby gem.
  • MultiJSONstars723 - A generic swappable back-end for JSON handling.

React

  • json2reactstars156 - Use JSON to create React Stateless Components.

.NET

  • jsonfxstars371 - serialization framework for .NET.
  • jsonapi-consumerstars4 - Client framework for consuming JSONAPI based APIs on the JSON API standard.

Scala

  • spray-jsonstars925 - A lightweight, clean and simple implementation in Scala.
  • circestars2.1k - Yet another JSON library for Scala.
  • scala-jsonapistars106 - Support library for integrating the JSON:API spec with Play, Spray and/or Circe backends.
  • jsoniter-scalastars428 - Scala macros for compile-time generation of ultra-fast JSON codecs.

Swift

  • SwiftyJSONstars20.5k - The better way to deal with data in Swift.

Linters

  • jsonlintstars1.7k - Parser and validator with a CLI. (Javascript)
  • JSON Lintstars1.2k - PHP linter. (PHP)

Online tools

  • JSONLint - The JSON Validator.
  • JSONCompare - The Advanced Version of the JSON Linter.
  • JSONMate - JSON editor, inspector and beautifier.
  • JSON Editor online - A web-based tool to view, edit and format.
  • Collapsible JSON Formatter - Formatter and Colorer of Raw Code.
  • JSON Formatter and Validator - Formatter to help with debugging.
  • JSON Generator - Tool for generating random data.
  • FakeJSON - Web API to quickly generate fake data for your application.
  • JSON to CSV - A free, in-browser JSON to CSV converter.
  • CSV to JSON - Easy, privacy-friendly and offline-first online csv to json converter
  • json2csharp - Generate c# classes from a json string or url.
  • JSON Utils - Site for generating C#, VB.Net, and Javascript classes from JSON.
  • geojson.io - Simply edit GeoJSON map data.
  • jq play - A playground for jq.
  • json2yaml - Convert JSON to YAML online.
  • JSON Selector Generator - A simple GUI for generating the selectors to access.
  • JSON.fr - Fully client-side validator and formatter.
  • ObjGen - Online live JSON generator.
  • JsonStub - Online JSON faker.
  • JSONPlaceholder - Fake Online REST API for Testing and Prototyping.
  • Extends Class - Diff tool to compare two files.
  • JSON Schema Validate API - A simple and free JSON Schema Validation API.
  • JSONLog - Logging and visualization of JSON from any client.
  • JSONPerf - A Visual, Unbiased and Up-to-Date JSON Performance Benchmark.

Schema Specifications

  • JSON Schema - a JSON based format for defining the structure of JSON data.
  • Itemscript - Language for validating and specifying values.
  • Kwalify - A parser, schema validator, and data binding tool
  • Rx - Simple, Extensible Schemata.

Services

  • Exchange Rate API - A simple and free API for currency exchange rate data.
  • ipinfo.io - JSON IP and GeoIP REST API.
  • JSONProxystars292 - Simple HTTP proxy that enables cross-domain requests to any JSON API.
  • Myjson - A simple store for your web or mobile app.
  • Telize - JSON IP and GeoIP REST API.
  • jsonpad - a simple JSON storage platform.

Supersets

  • YAML - A human friendly data serialization standard for all programming languages.
  • HanSONstars143 - JSON for Humans - with unquoted identifiers, multi-line strings and comments.
  • μsonstars69 (uson) - a shorthand for JSON.
  • HOCON - Human-Optimized Config Object Notation.
  • ASONstars2 - A semantically complete superset of JSON (draft).
  • TOMLstars15.3k - A minimal configuration file format that's easy to read due to obvious semantics.
  • HCLstars3.4k - A structured configuration language that is both human and machine friendly.

Tutorials

  • Introducing JSON
  • JSON Tutorial - An introductory tutorial on JavaScript Object Notation (JSON).
  • JSON - Rosetta Code - Basic operations in different languages (57 languages in this moment).
  • What is JSON and how to use it - Video tutorial for beginners.
  • jq Primer: Munging JSON Data - How jq can be used to process JSON files just as effectively as traditional Unix tools.

Related formats

  • AXONstars20 - A simple text based format for interchanging of objects, documents and data. It tries to combine the best of JSON, XML and YAML.
  • CSONstars1.3k - CoffeeScript-Object-Notation. JSON for CoffeeScript objects.
  • MSONstars839 - Markdown syntax compatible with describing JSON and JSON Schema.
  • ArchieML - Structured text format optimized for human writability.

Resources

  • Type-o-ramastars221 - JS type systems interportability, comparison of different JS type systems and conversion between them.
  • Awesome jqstars405 - A curated list of awesome jq tools and resources.

Templates

  • Jsonnet - A domain specific configuration language that helps you define JSON data.
  • rablstars3.6k - General ruby templating with json, bson, xml, plist and msgpack support. (Ruby)
  • json2html - HTML templating library with wrappers for both jQuery and Node.js. (Javascript)

Testing

  • JSON Test - Testing platform for services utilizing JavaScript Object Notation (JSON).
  • JSONassertstars797 - Write JSON unit tests in less code. Great for testing REST interfaces. (Java)
  • JsonUnitstars544 - A library that simplifies JSON comparison in unit tests. It's strongly inspired by XmlUnit.
  • JSON Parsing Test Suitestars589 - A very complete test suite and validation framework.

Text Editor Plugins

Emacs

  • JSON Reformatstars162 - Reformat tool.

Vim

  • vim-jsonstars1.2k - A better JSON for Vim: distinct highlighting of keywords vs values, JSON-specific (non-JS) warnings, quote concealing. Pathogen-friendly.

Transformations

  • json-sharpstars6 - Javascript tool to process operations on pure JSON objects. (Javascript)
  • json2jsonstars179 - Transform (reformat) structures from one to another. (Javascript)
  • transstars179 - The ultimate object transformer. (Javascript)
  • osmtogeojsonstars502 - Converts OSM data to GeoJSON. (Javascript)
  • fast-xml-parserstars1.1k - Fast XML to JSON and vice versa javascript/JSON conversion.
  • x2jsstars892 - XML to JSON and vice versa javascript conversion functions. (Javascript)
  • JSONCstars594 - JSON compressor and decompressor. (Javascript)
  • JsonMapperstars1.3k - Map nested structures onto PHP classes (PHP)
  • SassyJSONstars173 - Sass-powered API. (Sass)
  • json.human.js - A small library to convert a JSON object into a human readable HTML representation that is easy to style for different purposes.
  • JSONtoFoundationstars42 - OS X utility that converts a JSON object to a Foundation object that can be used in Cocoa/Cocoa Touch development. (Swift)
  • fancistars27 - Extract, rename and transform JSON based on a template. (node.js)
  • Pinchstars25 - String.replace for JavaScript objects. (Javascript)
  • deepjson - A better way to load big json config files. (node.js)
  • jsontlstars7 - allow transformation using a JSON-based transformation language. (node.js)
  • json-transformsstars116 - A recursive, pattern-matching, approach to transforming JSON structures.
  • normalizrstars20.1k - Normalizes nested JSON according to a schema. (Javascript)
  • JSON-populatestars105 - Tool for populating JSON data with infinitely recursive circular references. Sort of like Falcor, but for plain JSON.
  • CircularJSONstars593 - JSON does not handle circular references. Now it does.
  • Sawmillstars80 - JSON transformation library (Java)
  • nimnjsstars43 - JSON to nimn bidirectional converter.
  • stylopsstars0 - CSS subset to JSON conversion. (node.js)

Queries

  • daselstars891 - Query and update data structures using selectors from the command line. Comparable to jqstars19.4k / yqstars1.5k but supports JSON, YAML, TOML and XML with zero runtime dependencies.
  • JMESPath - A query language for JSON.
  • JSON Maskstars585 - Tiny language and engine for selecting specific parts of a JS object, hiding the rest. (Javascript)
  • JSONiq - The JSON Query Language.
  • ObjectPath - The agile query language for semi-structured data. (Python)
  • DefiantJS - Lightning-fast searches using XPath expressions, and transform using XSL. (Javascript)
  • JSONSelectstars1.6k - CSS-like selectors. (Javascript)
  • JSONPath - XPath implementation. (Javascript/PHP)
  • searchjsstars275 - A library for filtering based on a json SQL-like language.
  • json-relstars15 - Transparent references in JSON.
  • JSONata - Query and transformation language used in Node-RED, supports function expressions.

JSON Schema Frontend components

  • JSON Editorstars5.5k - JSON Schema Based Editor. (jQuery)
  • angular-schema-formstars2.4k - Generate forms. (AngularJS)
  • JSON Schema Viewstars45 - An AngularJS directive for rendering JSON Schema in HTML (AngularJS)
  • Angular JSON Schema Formstars30 - Angular directive for making forms out of JSON Schema. (AngularJS)
  • AlpacaJS - Generates JSON Schema driven forms on top of Bootstrap, jQuery Mobile, jQuery UI and HTML (jQuery)

JSON Schema Tools

  • prmdstars2.1k - Tools and doc generation for HTTP APIs.
  • generate-schemastars811 - Effortlessly convert your JSON Object to JSON Schema, Mongoose Schema, or a Generic template for quick documentation / upstart.
  • Docsonstars464 - Documentation for your types.
  • Orderly JSONstars205 - A textual format for describing JSON compiled into JSONSchema.
  • jsonschema2pojostars5.5k - Generates Java types and annotates those types for data-binding with Jackson 1.x or 2.x, Gson, etc.
  • Maticstars168 - Build tool for generating HTML documentation.
  • JSON Schema + Fakerstars2.5k - Fake your schemas.
  • DLL.jsstars62 - Gets you a JSON Schema from PostgreSQL or SQLite3.
  • JSONSchema.net - JSON Schema generator from JSON object.
  • js-schemastars379 - A new way of describing object schemas in JavaScript. It has a clean and simple syntax, and it is capable of serializing to/from the popular JSON Schema format.
  • aptosstars144 - A tool for validating data using JSON Schema and converting JSON Schema documents into different data-interchange formats.
  • JSON Schema $Ref Parserstars552 - Parse, resolve, and dereference JSON Schema $ref pointers

JSON Schema Resources

  • Understanding JSON Schema - A website aiming to provide more accessible documentation for JSON schema.
  • JSON Schema Store - A collection of popular schemas.
  • Using JSON Schema - a Book and GitHub project, showing how JSON Schema can be used for a variety of tasks and in different programming contexts.

JSON Schema Validators

Javascript and Node.js

  • json-schema-benchmarkstars347 - Performance benchmark for Node.js validators.
  • is-my-json-validstars920 - A validator that uses code generation to be extremely fast.
  • jsenstars156 - A validator built for speed.
  • themisstars59 - A blazing fast validator.
  • jsckstars162 - JSON Schema Compiled checK.
  • z-schemastars299 - validator written in JavaScript for NodeJS and Browsers.
  • jjvstars190 - Javascript Library for Schema Validation.
  • request-validatorstars0 - Flexible request validator middleware for express and connect.
  • tv4stars1.1k - Tiny Validator.
  • ajvstars9.2k - The fastest validator. Supports v5/6 proposals.

Java and Kotlin

  • Medeia Validatorstars50 - Compliant (draft-04/06/07) and fast streaming validator written in Kotlin

PHP

  • JSON Schema for PHPstars3.1k - PHP implementation of JSON schema.
  • JSON Guard - A validator for JSON Schema Draft 4.

Python

  • jsonschemastars3.2k - Python implementation of jsonschema.
  • JSON Schema Toolkitstars29 - Programmatic building of JSON schemas (recursive field mappings) with validation, a Django JSON Field, and native PostgreSQL JSON type constraints.

Ruby

  • Ruby JSON Schema Validatorstars1.2k - validating against a JSON schema conforming to JSON Schema Draft 4.

Contribute

Contributions welcome! Read the contribution guidelines first.

License

awesomeList.description: A curated list of awesome JSON libraries and resources.
awesomeList.descriptionHTML: A curated list of awesome JSON libraries and resources.
